activities_projects.title: Surface Area of Cube
activities_projects.objective: Calculate surface area of a cube
steps: Draw a cube with side length 5 cm
Calculate surface area using formula 6 × side²
Write the answer in notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands surface area formula for cube

activities_projects.title: Surface Area of Cuboid
activities_projects.objective: Calculate surface area of a cuboid
steps: Draw a cuboid with length 6 cm, breadth 4 cm, height 3 cm
Use formula 2(lb + bh + hl) to calculate surface area
Record answer in notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies surface area formula for cuboid

activities_projects.title: Surface Area of Sphere
activities_projects.objective: Calculate surface area of a sphere
steps: Take a sphere with radius 7 cm
Use formula 4πr² to calculate surface area
Write answer in notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands surface area formula for sphere

activities_projects.title: Surface Area of Cylinder
activities_projects.objective: Calculate surface area of a cylinder
steps: Draw a cylinder with radius 3 cm and height 10 cm
Use formula 2πr(h + r) to find surface area
Record answer
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies surface area formula for cylinder

activities_projects.title: Surface Area of Cone
activities_projects.objective: Calculate surface area of a cone
steps: Draw a cone with radius 4 cm and height 9 cm
Find slant height l = √(r² + h²)
Use formula πr(l + r) to calculate surface area
Write answer in notebook
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Applies surface area formula for cone

activities_projects.title: Volume of Cube
steps: Draw cube with side 5 cm
Use formula V = side³ to calculate volume
Record answer in notebook

activities_projects.title: Volume of Cuboid
steps: Draw cuboid with length 6 cm, breadth 4 cm, height 3 cm
Use formula V = l × b × h to calculate volume
Record answer

activities_projects.title: Volume of Sphere
steps: Take a sphere of radius 7 cm
Use formula V = 4/3 πr³ to calculate volume
Write answer in notebook

activities_projects.title: Volume of Cylinder
steps: Draw cylinder with radius 3 cm, height 10 cm
Use formula V = πr²h to calculate volume
Record answer

activities_projects.title: Volume of Cone
steps: Draw cone with radius 4 cm, height 9 cm
Use formula V = 1/3 πr²h to calculate volume
Write answer in notebook
